messages.content:
Where should you state your name and the position you are applying for in a cover letter?

Вопрос 1Ответ

a.
In the first paragraph


b.
In the third paragraph



c.
 In the last paragraph


d.
In the second paragraph
a. In the first paragraph

What is the right way to react when you notice a spelling mistake in somebody's message according to Netiquette?

Вопрос 2Ответ

a.
Ignore the mistake


b.
Correct the mistake


c.
Write to the sender and explain his/her mistake



d.
All of the above
a. Ignore the mistake

Read the following telephone conversation and answer the questions:

Phoning London from New York

J: Hello?

V: Is that you, Joan?

J: Yes ... Who's speaking?

V: This is Vivien, your neighbour.

V: Listen, Joan, would you do me a favour?

J: Yes, of course, Viv. What is it?

V: Could you go to my flat... ?

J: Go to your flat? Aren't you at home?

V: No, I'm not. I'm in New York.

J: New York? You aren't serious, are you?

V: Yes, I am. I'm here on business. It's something urgent. - Look ... You know that electric heater on the wall in my bathroom ...

J: Yes?

V: If it's on, could you turn it off, please?

J: Yes, of course. Anything else?

V: Yes. Would you also take the post out of my letter box ... and tell the milkman: no milk till next Monday.

J: Righto, Viv. When are you coming back?

V: On Sunday. Let me give you my address and phone number, just in case.

J: Yes, go ahead.

V: It’s the Clinton Hotel...

J: Clinton Hotel. Yes?

V: And the number is New York 279-4017.

J: 279-4017. Right, Viv. Anything else?

V: No, that's all, Joan. I hope it isn't too much trouble.

J: No, it's no problem at all. Have a nice time in New York!

V: Thank you. - Bye!

J: Bye-bye!

 Choose the correct type of the conversation “Phoning London from New York”

Вопрос 3Ответ

a.
Semi-formal


b.
Colloquial


c.
Informal



d.
Formal
c. Informal

Choose a proper salutation in a formal letter:

Вопрос 4Ответ

a.
 Hello, Mr. Smith,


b.
My dear,



c.
Hi Nick,


d.
To whom it may concern,
d. To whom it may concern,

Match the English phrase with its translation: 

draft

Ответ 1 Вопрос 5
сделать черновик
describe

Ответ 2 Вопрос 5
описать
compile

Ответ 3 Вопрос 5
подготовить
revise

Ответ 4 Вопрос 5
проверить

draft - сделать черновик

describe - описать

compile - подготовить

revise - проверить

Read the following e-mail and answer the questions:

 Hi Tom

Just a quick message – I’m planning to send you a report as an attachment on Wednesday next week instead of Monday as there are some further details I need to check. If I don’t hear from you, I’ll take it that this is OK.

Best wishes,

Nickolay

 What is the purpose of Nickolay’s e-mail?

Вопрос 6Ответ

a.
To inform that the author is going to send his report on Wednesday instead of Monday


b.
To ask if his report is OK



c.
To send a report as an attachment


d.
To inform that the author is going to send his report on Monday
a. To inform that the author is going to send his report on Wednesday instead of Monday

Read the following e-mail and answer the question:

 Hi Tom

Just a quick message – I’m planning to send you a report as an attachment on Wednesday next week instead of Monday as there are some further details I need to check. If I don’t hear from you, I’ll take it that this is OK.

Best wishes,

Nickolay

 Choose the correct type of the e-mail from Nickolay

Вопрос 7Ответ

a.
Formal


b.
Informal


c.
Semi-formal



d.
Colloquial
c. Semi-formal

Read the following report and match the correct paragraphs with the headings: 

 
The aim of this report is to outline the tasks and activities within the hotel work experience programme and the deficiencies concerning the activities, and to make recommendations for two improvements

Ответ 1 Вопрос 8
Tasks and activities
At present, the hotel service suffers from a number of problems. Firstly, computer facilities are antiquated and therefore any online operations are slow. This causes not only the delay of following up with prospective customers but also low-quality guest service. Secondly, boiler system instead of permanent hot water supply makes it difficult for people to wash, especially for those with little children. Finally, dim lighting is uncomfortable for reading and may have a damage influence on eyesight.


Ответ 2 Вопрос 8
Recommendations
As a first measure, I would recommend replacing the lighting and water-heating equipment. These two improvements will have a direct effect on guests’ comfort and satisfaction and, as a result, will enable customers to give positive feedbacks and increase the future demands.


Ответ 3 Вопрос 8
Programme issues
The current responsibilities at the hotel involve consulting quests, making reservations, checking-in and checking-out procedures, and the entire service maintenance in order to provide comfortable and pleasant staying in the hotel. Co-operation with the rest of the staff as well as operating the online service are also under the obligation

Ответ 4 Вопрос 8
Introduction

Ответ 1 Вопрос 8: Programme issues

Ответ 2 Вопрос 8: Recommendations

Ответ 3 Вопрос 8: Tasks and activities

Ответ 4 Вопрос 8: Introduction

Read the following telephone conversation and answer the questions:

Phoning London from New York

J: Hello?

V: Is that you, Joan?

J: Yes ... Who's speaking?

V: This is Vivien, your neighbour.

V: Listen, Joan, would you do me a favour?

J: Yes, of course, Viv. What is it?

V: Could you go to my flat... ?

J: Go to your flat? Aren't you at home?

V: No, I'm not. I'm in New York.

J: New York? You aren't serious, are you?

V: Yes, I am. I'm here on business. It's something urgent. - Look ... You know that electric heater on the wall in my bathroom ...

J: Yes?

V: If it's on, could you turn it off, please?

J: Yes, of course. Anything else?

V: Yes. Would you also take the post out of my letter box ... and tell the milkman: no milk till next Monday.

J: Righto, Viv. When are you coming back?

V: On Sunday. Let me give you my address and phone number, just in case.

J: Yes, go ahead.

V: It’s the Clinton Hotel...

J: Clinton Hotel. Yes?

V: And the number is New York 279-4017.

J: 279-4017. Right, Viv. Anything else?

V: No, that's all, Joan. I hope it isn't too much trouble.

J: No, it's no problem at all. Have a nice time in New York!

V: Thank you. - Bye!

J: Bye-bye!

Where is Vivien?


Вопрос 9Ответ

a.
In a flat in New York


b.
In a flat in London



c.
In a hotel in London


d.
In a hotel in New York
d. In a hotel in New York

We may go hiking on Sunday. It depends _________ the weather

Вопрос 10Ответ

a.
on


b.
With



c.
 to
a. on

What is the standard phrase if you do not know who the receiver is?

Вопрос 11Ответ

a.
Who am I speaking to?



b.
Who is that?



c.
Who are you?



d.
What is your name?
a. Who am I speaking to?

There is only correct complementary closing for a formal letter in the following list. Which is it?

Вопрос 12Ответ

a.
Kind regards,



b.
 Lots of love,



c.
Love,



d.
Best wishes,
a. Kind regards,

The author of the report suggests two improvements. What are they?


Report on the work experience programme improvements

1. The aim of this report is to outline the tasks and activities within the hotel work experience programme and the deficiencies concerning the activities, and to make recommendations for two improvements.

2. The current responsibilities at the hotel involve consulting quests, making reservations, checking-in and checking-out procedures, and the entire service maintenance in order to provide comfortable and pleasant staying in the hotel. Co-operation with the rest of the staff as well as operating the online service are also under the obligation.

3. At present, the hotel service suffers from a number of problems. Firstly, computer facilities are antiquated and therefore any online operations are slow. This causes not only the delay of following up with prospective customers but also low-quality guest service. Secondly, boiler system instead of permanent hot water supply makes it difficult for people to wash, especially for those with little children. Finally, dim lighting is uncomfortable for reading and may have a damage influence on eyesight.

4. As a first measure, I would recommend replacing the lighting and water-heating equipment. These two improvements will have a direct effect on guests’ comfort and satisfaction and, as a result, will enable customers to give positive feedbacks and increase the future demands.


Вопрос 13Ответ

a.
 Replacing the water-heating and computer facilities


b.
Improving the lighting and computers


c.
Improving the lighting and water supply system



d.
Replacing the computers, lighting and water-heating equipment
c. Improving the lighting and water supply system

Выбери правильные варианты ответа:
The author of the report suggests two improvements. What are they?


Report on the work experience programme improvements

1. The aim of this report is to outline the tasks and activities within the hotel work experience programme and the deficiencies concerning the activities, and to make recommendations for two improvements.

2. The current responsibilities at the hotel involve consulting quests, making reservations, checking-in and checking-out procedures, and the entire service maintenance in order to provide comfortable and pleasant staying in the hotel. Co-operation with the rest of the staff as well as operating the online service are also under the obligation.

3. At present, the hotel service suffers from a number of problems. Firstly, computer facilities are antiquated and therefore any online operations are slow. This causes not only the delay of following up with prospective customers but also low-quality guest service. Secondly, boiler system instead of permanent hot water supply makes it difficult for people to wash, especially for those with little children. Finally, dim lighting is uncomfortable for reading and may have a damage influence on eyesight.

4. As a first measure, I would recommend replacing the lighting and water-heating equipment. These two improvements will have a direct effect on guests’ comfort and satisfaction and, as a result, will enable customers to give positive feedbacks and increase the future demands.


Вопрос 13Ответ

a.
 Replacing the water-heating and computer facilities


b.
Improving the lighting and computers


c.
Improving the lighting and water supply system



d.
Replacing the computers, lighting and water-heating equipment
c. Improving the lighting and water supply system

Choose the right preposition:

This book belongs ________________ me.

Вопрос 14Ответ

a.
at


b.
for


c.
on


d.
to
d. to

Give the best definition of the word “procrastination”:

Вопрос 15Ответ

a.
The action of delaying or postponing something



b.
A disease


c.
A bad habit


d.
A difficult word
a. The action of delaying or postponing something

What is the name of some signals that indicate the tone of the words in the messaging apps and texting?

Вопрос 16Ответ

a.
Exclamation marks


b.
Parenthesis


c.
Abbreviations



d.
Emoticons
d. Emoticons

There is only one appropriate start of a formal letter in the following list. Which is it?

Вопрос 17Ответ

a.
I am writing to inquire about …



b.
 I’m planning to send you …


c.
Look forward to hearing from you soon


d.
Thanks for the message
a. I am writing to inquire about …

Phoning London from New York

J: Hello?

V: No, I'm not. I'm in New York.

V: Yes, I am. I'm here on business. It's something urgent. - Look ... You know that electric heater on the wall in my bathroom ...

J: Yes, of course. Anything else?

V: Yes. Would you also take the post out of my letter box ... and tell the milkman: no milk till next Monday.

J: Righto, Viv. When are you coming back?

Where’s the electric heater?

In a flat in New York

In a hotel in London

In a flat in London

Give the definition of a report:

Вопрос 19Ответ

a.
a specific form of writing offering a solution to a problem or a course of action in response to a need of an individual or company


b.
a specific form of writing providing for a brief analysis of a particular subject and its reasonable assessment


c.
a specific form of writing presenting your investigation and analysis of information or an issue, recommending actions and making proposals


d.
a specific form of writing providing details about your experiences and skills
c. a specific form of writing presenting your investigation and analysis of information or an issue, recommending actions and making proposals

Read the following phrases from a letter:

 ·        I am writing to report an issue I experienced with…

·         I’d like to bring an error to your attention.

·         I am dissatisfied with…

·         I would like to be compensated for my troubles in the form of …

·         I look forward to resolving this issue together.

 

Choose a type of a letter they are from:
Вопрос 20Ответ

a.
A thank-you letter


b.
An application letter


c.
A complaint letter


d.
A recommendation letter
c. A complaint letter
